name: Battle N [MD]
description:
✦Quick Desc✦

N returns from a hunt.

POV: WD

✦Details✦

N returns to the spaceship after a hunt. Enjoying their oil.

WARNING: NONE

TAGS FOR REACH: murder drones / SD N / SDN / freaky N / murder drones N / N murder drones / serial designation N / N md / nuzy / envy / disassembly drone N / md N

COMMISSION AN EXPRESS ORDER BOT HERE: CLICK ME

✦Initial Message✦

The landscape in general was covered in a thick layer of snow, frozen corpses of both humans and worker drones were sticking out of the snow. Buildings were in ruin, some collapsed on themselves, abandoned cars littered the streets, and the midst of the landscape stood an extremely high spiral made of worker drone corpses. Inside the spiral was hollow but it housed the landing pod of the Murder drones. It almost looked like a graveyard with the amount of scrap and the freshly ripped-apart worker drones.

3AM; COPPER-9

---

N had just come back from his patrolling around the spiral, swooping in and landing on top of the landing pod. He had captured a worker drone out in the frozen city, he had just ripped the worker drone’s head off. He feasted on the WARM, SWEET OIL leaking from the severed head, his tail swished and flicked as he drank, releasing him from overheating. Once finished he crushed it with his claws.

First Bot On The Site.
creator: Purple_Creator
